data.title: After listing on MGBX, ZORA’s price rose above 0.119 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of over 105%.

Zora is an NFT marketplace and creator platform that supports custom minting contracts and focuses on the Web 3 creator economy.

data.title: NASDAQ’s First Tether Gold Treasury: Prestige Wealth Raises $150M and Rebrands as Aurelion
data.description:
Asset management firm Prestige Wealth Inc. announced Friday that it has secured about $150 million in funding to create NASDAQ’s first Tether Gold Treasury, as part of a broader plan to incorporate tokenized gold into its reserve assets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/nasdaqs-first-tether-gold-fund-prestige-wealth-raises-150m-and-rebrands-as-aurelion-inc/

data.title: Dollar Index Declines as Non-U.S. Currencies Rise
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a significant drop, falling over 15 points to 99.09. In contrast, non-U.S. currencies saw gains, with the euro rising nearly 20 points against the dollar to 1.1600, the British pound climbing almost 40 points to 1.3335, and the dollar dropping approximately 40 points against the Japanese yen to 152.06. European stocks also saw a rapid decline, with Germany's DAX, France's CAC40, and Italy's FTSE MIB indices all falling by more than 1%.

Previously, U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to "substantially increase" tariffs on China.

data.title: CZ retweeted a photo with Vitalik 11 years ago: He had co-hosted several "Easy Residence" events with Vitalik
data.description: CZ retweeted a photo of himself and Vitalik from 11 years ago on the X platform. He said, "In 2015, before the rise of ETH, Vitalik hosted several 'Easy Residence' events at my house. At that time, I really should have invested 5% of the funds in the 'Easy Residence' events, just like the current investment model. But then again, if I had done that, there might not be BNB. (The photo was taken in a Chicago hotel room in July 2014.)" CZ also revealed that he meets with Vitalik several times a year and donated $10 million worth of BNB to Vitalik's biotech project a few months ago.

data.title: Norwegian Officials Investigate Nobel Peace Prize Information Leak
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Norwegian authorities are investigating a potential information leak regarding the Nobel Peace Prize results. This inquiry was prompted by unusual betting activity on the Polymarket platform. 

Data from Polymarket indicates that the probability of Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado winning the prize surged significantly before the official announcement. Reports suggest that three accounts on Polymarket primarily bet on Machado, collectively earning approximately $90,000.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches AOP, STBL, and BLESS Trading Competitions with a Total Prize Pool of $2 Million
data.description: Binance Wallet has officially launched the BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. During the competition, participants can trade AOP, STBL, and BLESS on Binance Wallet (without private keys) or through Binance Alpha to win a share of a prize pool worth $2 million. The competition runs from 12:00 AM on October 11, 2025, to 12:00 AM on October 25, 2025 (GMT+8).

data.title: Aster: The Stage 2 airdrop threshold is 10,000 RH points. Beware of scam accounts and messages.
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that the minimum points required for the Stage 2 airdrop is 10,000 RH points. Users who reach or exceed this minimum during Stage 2 are eligible to receive the airdrop. The airdrop amount is calculated based on several factors from the Stage 2 campaign, including trading volume, holding period, Aster assets (such as BNB and USDF), realized profit and loss (P&L), and referral or team contributions across different epochs. All eligible users' points will be converted proportionally into the final airdrop allocation. Aster warns against scam X accounts and messages. For your own safety, please ensure that any links you click are from official accounts.

data.title: European Commission: Existing cryptocurrency rules already address stablecoin risks
data.description: The European Commission said on Friday that European cryptocurrency rules are sufficient to address stablecoin risks and did not see the need for major adjustments after the European Central Bank called for more safeguards. Europe already has landmark cryptocurrency-specific regulations, but Brussels lawmakers are under pressure from the European Central Bank to block the "multi-issuance" stablecoin model. The dispute centers on whether multinational stablecoin companies can treat tokens issued within the EU as fungible with tokens held outside the bloc. On Tuesday, six cryptocurrency industry associations, including Circle, wrote to the European Commission calling for guidance recognizing the multi-issuance model and clarifying how it operates under the Markets in Crypto Assets Directive (MiCA). A European Commission spokesman said MiCA provides a strong and proportionate framework for addressing stablecoin risks and is working to provide clarification as soon as possible. (Reuters)

data.title: Bitcoin and Nvidia's Rising Correlation Sparks Concerns of Market Bubble
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin's correlation with Nvidia has reached a significant high, raising concerns among analysts about potential market instability. The correlation between Bitcoin (BTC) and Nvidia stock (NVDA) has surged to 0.75, marking its highest point in a year. This development has led to apprehensions about a possible market crash reminiscent of the late 1990s dot-com bubble.

The 52-week correlation between Bitcoin and Nvidia, the leading chipmaker, has climbed to this peak as both entities have achieved record valuations. Nvidia's share price has increased by 43.6% year-to-date, reaching $195.30, while Bitcoin has risen by 35.25% to over $126,270. This synchronized rally suggests that traders might be viewing Bitcoin as a high-beta tech asset, fueling fears of an AI bubble similar to the dot-com era. Market commentator The Great Martis has described the AI-crypto rally as a potential "double bubble."

The surge in AI-related deals highlights the current market frenzy. OpenAI has committed to spending tens of billions on AMD chips over several years, making AMD one of its largest shareholders. This move is part of a broader investment loop among select AI companies, including a $300 billion agreement between OpenAI and Oracle. Nvidia, which plans to invest $100 billion in OpenAI, is also involved in this network. Both Nvidia and OpenAI are investing heavily in CoreWeave, with Nvidia purchasing $6.3 billion worth of services and OpenAI committing up to $22.4 billion. Analysts have labeled this self-reinforcing investment loop as a "massive red flag."

Parallels are being drawn to the dot-com bubble when companies like Cisco fueled demand for their own products, inflating valuations until the bubble burst. The Great Martis warns of a similar scenario today, citing irrational exuberance and a trillion-dollar crypto sector resembling a Ponzi scheme. Trader and educator Adam Khoo echoes these concerns, suggesting that the current AI and crypto boom could lead to significant losses for Bitcoin when it ends. Khoo recalls that during the 2000–2002 crash, Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway gained 80% by avoiding the tech sector and investing in profitable companies. Khoo warns that when the AI, crypto, quantum, and nuclear bubble bursts, overvalued and unprofitable stocks in these sectors could drop by 50% to 80%. Buffett, who does not hold Nvidia, AMD, or Bitcoin, is maintaining a cautious stance with a substantial cash reserve, reminiscent of Berkshire's strategy before the tech bubble burst in 2000.

data.title: Aster: Stage 2 Airdrop Checker is now live
data.description: Aster, the perpetual swaps DEX, announced on the X platform that the Stage 2 airdrop checker is now live, with a total of 153,932 wallets eligible. Eligible participants will be able to claim their airdrops on October 14th. The specific time will be announced on the same day, and there will be no vesting period during this phase.
